root.rep_text: รายงานรายการวัสดุที่ประมวลผิดพลาด
root.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.total_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.present_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.cal_expire_date, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.edit_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.edit_date, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.entry_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.entry_date, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old FROM sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit, sc_acc_m_expire WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.meterial_id = sc_acc_m_expire.material_id ) /* and ( ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.edit_date between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate )*/ AND ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail_edit.type_expire = 'DELETE_DEL' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
